data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: UAE denies Netanyahu's secret visit during Iran war • Third round of Israel-Lebanon talks set for Thursday • IDF strikes Hezbollah targets in Lebanon, kills Hamas terrorist in Gaza
